data.title: CZ: The number of followers on X platform has exceeded 10 million. Interacting with others does not mean that you approve of them.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Co-founder CZ posted on the X platform: "Cryptocurrency has grown and my fans have also grown, now exceeding 10 million. Thank you for your support during this journey. I try to interact with as many people as possible, but I can't do background checks on everyone. My interaction does not mean recognition. Stay SAFU."

data.title: The Monad testnet is currently suspended and is being restored
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Monad co-founder Keone Hon said that the Monad testnet is currently suspended due to the failure to reach majority consensus at the epoch boundary. This round of epoch was originally planned to add 15 validators to the active validator set, but the conversion process did not go as expected. The validator nodes are working hard to resolve the problem and resume network operation as soon as possible.

data.title: ZachXBT: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid may be a criminal who was arrested for casino theft
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News ZachXBT published an investigation on the identity of the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid on the X platform. By tracking on-chain transactions, it was found that a person named "William Parker" was related to the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid. Last year, he was arrested for stealing about $1 million from two casinos in 2023 and sentenced in Finland. Before that, he was called Alistair Packover (William Peckover), and later changed his name.
In the early 2010s, Alistair Packover made headlines in the UK several times for fraud charges related to hacking and gambling. It is clear that he has not learned his lesson after serving years for fraud and may continue to gamble. The funds are currently mainly stored in:
0x51d99A4022a55CAd07a3c958F0600d8bb0B39921

data.title: Gate.io Launches Bedrock(BR) Spot Trading and Starts HODLer Airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch Bedrock (BR) spot trading at 21:00 on March 20, 2025 (UTC+8), and will start the HODLer Airdrop from 19:00 on March 20 to 18:00 on March 21 (UTC+8). Holders of 1 GT can receive the airdrop for free and share 960,000 BR tokens. The upper limit for individual participation is 1,000 GT.

data.title: Fox reporter: Ripple CEO’s net worth has reached about $10 billion, but the company lacks information disclosure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Fox reporter Charles Gasparino posted on the X platform that as the price of XRP rises, Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse's personal net worth has reached about $10 billion, but Ripple does not seem to have publicly submitted any documents about how much money the company has made. After all, Ripple is a traditional enterprise, which will be a problem that Paul Atkins and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission need to pay attention to in the future, because according to securities laws, these are usually required to disclose financial information.

data.title: Monad Testnet Faces Temporary Suspension Due to Consensus Issue
data.description: According to Foresight News, Monad co-founder Keone Hon announced that the Monad testnet has been temporarily suspended. The suspension occurred due to a failure to reach a majority consensus at the epoch boundary. The current epoch was intended to add 15 validators to the active validator set, but the transition did not proceed as planned. Validator nodes are actively working to resolve the issue and restore network operations.

data.title: Coinbase proposes four suggestions calling on the US SEC to clarify digital asset regulation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hester Peirce, Commissioner of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), has solicited opinions in February on how the newly established cryptocurrency working group should deal with cryptocurrency issues. Faryar Shirzad, Chief Policy Officer of Coinbase, pointed out that Washington urgently needs to clarify the issue of cryptocurrency. The exchange has made four suggestions to the SEC, one of which aims to clarify that "digital assets that do not represent any corporate rights are not securities" but should be "digital commodities." Coinbase also asked the SEC to recognize that Congress should define "appropriate regulatory treatment of digital assets in the presence of ambiguity." However, the exchange stated in the document that stablecoins should be excluded from the jurisdiction of the SEC while Congress is formulating legislation. Coinbase's other two major suggestions include asking the SEC to clarify that "secondary market transactions in digital commodities are not securities transactions" and focusing on allowing stakeholders to tokenize traditional securities (such as tokenized debt). (Block)

data.title: The official contract address of Bedrock token will be announced after it goes live
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bedrock announced the official contract address after its token $BR went online: 0xff7d6a96ae471bbcd7713af9cb1feeb16cf56b41
In addition, eligible users can now claim tokens. The claim window will open at 1:00 pm (UTC time) on March 20 and will last for 90 days. At the same time, $BR staking will be launched soon.
Bedrock officials remind the community to be wary of fake tokens. Be sure to verify the contract address through official channels before interacting.

data.title: FLock and Base reached a new cooperation, and the FLock model replaced Claude and connected to Base MCP
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The decentralized AI training platform FLock.io announced a new cooperation with the blockchain platform Base. The FLock Web3 Agent model will replace the centralized model Claude and connect to the Base MCP, bringing a new upgrade to on-chain interactions. This collaboration aims to address the current problems of complex blockchain operations and high privacy risks of centralized AI agents, and to provide users with smarter and more efficient on-chain services.
Through this cooperation, FLock's Web3 AI proxy model will support local operation on user devices without uploading data to a third party, ensuring privacy and security while achieving accurate function calls. With this solution, users can automate DeFi transactions, manage wallet assets, optimize gas fees, and quickly deploy smart contracts, significantly reducing the technical threshold of the on-chain economy and improving operational efficiency. Developers will also benefit from this, and the blockchain integration process will become simpler and more convenient.

data.title: Bitget launches Bedrock (BR)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget has launched Bedrock (BR) at 13:00 UTC time on March 20, trading pair: BR/USDT.
